verdict: Data entry is the canonical AI-displaced job: structured extraction is solved, OCR + LLM pipelines outperform humans on most form-handling tasks, and WEF lists it as the single fastest-declining role globally. If you're considering this as a career, pivot now to operations or analytics roles that supervise the automation.
timeline_callout: The role is actively shrinking — BLS projects -23% over the decade, the steepest decline of any major occupation.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: The entire job is structured data manipulation — exactly what LLMs + OCR pipelines do best.

creative_judgment.reasoning: None of the job is creative.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: Errors are easily caught and corrected downstream.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: Solved problem — modern document AI exceeds human accuracy on most form types.

key_tasks.task: Enter data from source documents into databases
key_tasks.note: OCR + LLM extraction pipeline replaces this directly.
Automated validation rules outperform human spot-checks.

key_tasks.task: Compile and sort information for entry
Locate and correct data entry errors
key_tasks.note: Edge cases still surface to humans, but the supervisory role is fundamentally different.

key_tasks.task: Generate reports and respond to inquiries
Maintain logs of activities and completed work

evidence_ledger.contribution: #1 fastest-declining role globally — survey of 800+ employers.
Projects -23% — among the steepest declines in the entire OOH.
Data entry near 100% automatable with current technology.
Among the highest exposure scores in the dataset.

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Task list confirms ~95% of duties are structured-extraction work.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=10, ai_capability_gap=10, creative_judgment=0, regulatory_moat=0, embodied_work=0, stakes_of_error=2, relationships=1, physical_dexterity=1.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists Data Entry Clerk at 88. Computed 97 is 9 above the anchor. Soften to 88 — even fully-exposed roles take time to fully wind down due to legacy systems and small-business adoption lag. The anchor reflects realistic 2026-2030 displacement, not the theoretical maximum.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: High ±5 — every dataset agrees this is the most exposed major occupation.

adjacent_careers.name: Operations Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: You supervise the automated pipelines instead of being one.

adjacent_careers.name: Data Quality Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Human-in-the-loop role for the AI systems that replaced data entry.

adjacent_careers.name: Administrative Assistant (Executive)
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Higher-judgment admin work survives longer; aim for the executive variant, not the general one.

adjacent_careers.name: Bookkeeper / Accounting Clerk
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Similar trajectory but pivot path through accounting can lead to CPA.

adjacent_careers.name: Customer Success Specialist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Relationship work has more durability; transferable from any back-office role.

action_plan.title: Don't aim for this as a destination — aim past it
action_plan.description: If you wanted office work, the analyst track has 5-10× the longevity for similar starting credentials.

action_plan.title: Get an Excel + SQL certification this year
action_plan.description: Both are gateway credentials for the operations and analyst pivots.

action_plan.title: Take a community-college accounting class
action_plan.description: Opens the bookkeeper → CPA pathway with real licensure at the end.

action_plan.title: Volunteer to use AI tools in any current admin work
action_plan.description: Showing you can deploy automation rather than being replaced by it is the new differentiator.
